_comment: The config Claude turns into the engine's args. You fill in target/gates/conventions; Claude adds the bulky fields: for phase review it reads the gen-manifest output and injects `units`; for phase resolve it greps the triaged issues/*.md into `issues`. Generate the manifest first: node gen-manifest.mjs --repo /ABS/REPO --src src --out runs/myproject-review/manifest.json
conventions: The project's coding rules, distilled to ~10 lines: error-handling pattern, logging rules, validation/schema conventions, strictness level, what counts as a defect here. The reviewer judges against these; deviations become 'convention' findings. (The blind quality reviewer in phase resolve is NOT shown these.)

gates.build: SHELL COMMAND that lints/compiles, a non-zero exit code means FAIL (must always pass)
gates.test: SHELL COMMAND that runs the test suite (must be GREEN before you start resolve)
gates.testSetup: Notes for authoring + running tests: how to scope a single test, runner quirks, container exec prefix, fixtures/DB isolation.
